privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated instructions (an inspection brief for a grain silo). The target output path is /home/ga/Documents/QGC/silo_inspection.plan. The expected drone mission must include a Structure Scan with a minimum height of 25m (target 28m), at least 3 layers, and a gimbal pitch between -10 and 10 degrees. The plan must also include Takeoff (MAVLink command 22) and RTL (MAVLink command 20) items.
